zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Clavering於大約1275年出生在英國艾可可拉維林時，他的父親Robert FitzRoger Clavering42歲，母親Baroness Margery La Zouche25歲。他和Margery de Clavering至少有1個女兒。他去世在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Clavering于大约1275年出生在英国艾可可拉維林时，他的父亲Robert FitzRoger Clavering42岁，母亲Baroness Margery La Zouche25岁。他和Margery de Clavering至少有1个女儿。他去世在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Clavering
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name; the Essex name is from Clavering (Essex), but in NE England it is probably from Clavering near Wooler (Northumb).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Clavering was born about 1275, in Clavering, Essex, England, his father, Robert FitzRoger Clavering, was 42 and his mother, Baroness Margery La Zouche, was 25. He had at least 1 daughter with Margery de Clavering. He died in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Clavering est né environ 1275, à Clavering, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Robert FitzRoger Clavering, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Baroness Margery La Zouche, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Margery de Clavering. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Clavering um 1275 in Clavering, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert FitzRoger Clavering 42 und seine Mutter Baroness Margery La Zouche 25. Er hatte mit Margery de Clavering mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Clavering è nato il circa 1275 nel Clavering, Essex, England, il suo padre, Robert FitzRoger Clavering, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Baroness Margery La Zouche, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Margery de Clavering. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.Clavering, Essex, England: イギリスエセックスクラバーイング
ja.Burgh St. Mary, Flegg, Norfolk, England: イギリスノーフォルクブルグ
ja.lifeSummary: Robert Claveringが約1275年にイギリスエセックスクラバーイングで生まれた時，父Robert FitzRoger Claveringは42歳，母Baroness Margery La Zoucheは25歳であった。彼はMargery de Claveringとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Clavering(이)가 대략 1275년 영국 에세스 클레이버링에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert FitzRoger Clavering(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Baroness Margery La Zouche(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Margery de Clavering(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Clavering nasceu aproximadamente 1275, em Clavering, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert FitzRoger Clavering, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Baroness Margery La Zouche, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Margery de Clavering. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Clavering родился около 1275 г. в местности клавиринг, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert FitzRoger Clavering было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Baroness Margery La Zouche, 25. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Margery de Clavering. Он умер в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Clavering nació aproximadamente 1275, en Clavering, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert FitzRoger Clavering, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Baroness Margery La Zouche, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Margery de Clavering. Murió en su pueblo.
